questions.question:
What is the output of the following C program? 

 #include < stdio.h >
#define SQR(x) (x*x)  

int main()
{
    int a;
    int b=4;
    a=SQR(b+2);
    printf("%d\n",a); 
    return 0;
}


(ISRO CSE 2014)
questions.explanation: Click here for detail solution by gateoverflow

questions.question:
What is the output of the following program?

 Class Test
{ 
    public static void main (String [] args) 
    {  
        int x = 0; 
        int y = 0 
        for (int z = 0; z < 5; z++)
        { 
            if((++x >2)||(++y  > 2)) 
            {
                x++;
            }
        }
    System.out.printIn (x+ "" + y); 
    }
}


(ISRO CSE 2013)
questions.explanation: Click here for detail solution by gateoverflow

questions.question:
Consider the following C code.

 #include < stdio.h > 
#include < math.h > 
void main ()  
{  
      double pi = 3.1415926535;   
      int a = 1;  
      int i;    
      for (i=0; i < 3; i++) 
            if (a = cos(pi * i/2)) 
                  printf("% d", 1);  
            else printf("%d", 0); 
}

What would the program print?

(ISRO CSE 2013)
questions.explanation: Click here for detail solution by gateoverflow
